name: PhilateLister stamp catalog
author: Exergy ∞ LLC
description: Entity shard: links stamps to thematic tags.

entities.name: stamp_thematic_tag
entities.brief: Assignment of a thematic tag to a stamp.
entities.description: Many-to-many link; supports primary vs secondary topical roles and free-text rationale.

fields.name: thematic_link_id
fields.description: Surrogate primary key for this assignment.

fields.name: role
fields.description: How this tag relates to other tags on the same stamp.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Optional model or human confidence 0.0–1.0 for ML-assisted tagging.

fields.name: notes
fields.description: Rationale or caveats for this thematic assignment.
